source: https://esta.cbp.dhs.gov/ and https://esta.cbp.dhs.gov/download/app?hideClose=true (official CBP home and printable application), plus https://www.cbp.gov/sites/default/files/documents/Vol_49_No_17_Title.pdf (CBP mandatory-field notice); re-checked 2026-07-14. CBP publishes no passport-number length limit, so this local checker uses a broad 1-20 alphanumeric range instead of treating the plan's 6-15 range as official.

passport.label: Passport number
passport.help: Copy the number exactly from the VWP e-passport used for travel. This checker accepts a broad alphanumeric range because CBP publishes no fixed length.

errors.tooShort: Enter the passport number printed on the photo page
errors.tooLong: Check the passport number — this local checker allows up to 20 characters
errors.invalidFormat: Use the letters and numbers printed as the passport number

full_name.label: Full name
full_name.help: Enter every family and given name in the Latin spelling shown on the passport.

errors.tooShort: Enter the name shown on the passport

date_of_birth.label: Date of birth
date_of_birth.help: Use YYYY-MM-DD in this local checker. Match the passport date.

errors.tooLate: Date of birth cannot be after 2026-07-13

email.label: Email
email.help: Use an address you control. ESTA requires email verification and sends the application number here.

errors.tooLong: Email is too long — max 254 characters in this checker

phone.label: Phone number
phone.help: Include the country code. If you have no phone, CBP permits a reachable third-party contact number.

errors.required: A contact phone number is required

home_address.label: Home address
home_address.help: Enter your current home address. CBP lists home address as required application information.

employer.label: Current or previous employer
employer.help: Answer Yes or No. If Yes, enter the current or previous employer details requested by ESTA; employer address and phone are only applicable when you have an employer to report.

errors.required: Answer whether you have a current or previous employer

us_contact.label: U.S. point of contact
us_contact.help: Use a friend, relative, business contact, or the place you will stay. CBP permits UNKNOWN when you do not know the information.

errors.required: Enter a U.S. contact, place of stay, or UNKNOWN

social_media.label: Social media
social_media.help: The current official ESTA printable application labels this section Optional. Add identifiers if you choose, select no online presence when applicable, or leave it blank.

errors.invalidOption: Choose a listed option or leave this optional field blank
